windows.embed_text_v2: Burning tall mason jar candle inside sooty brick fireplace, glowing orange melt pool around centered wick, white unmelted wax below, terracotta saucer base, cinder block surround, candle burn test reveal.
windows.summary_v2: A tall homemade mason jar candle burns inside a brick fireplace alcove, the upper third melted to a glowing orange pool while the lower wax remains solid white.

tags_v2.action: showing burning mason jar candle mid burn

seconds_v2.desc: Tall mason jar candle sits in a clay/terracotta saucer inside a sooty brick fireplace; the upper third glows orange around the burning wick while the lower portion is opaque white wax; cinder block chunks flank the jar.
Same jar from slightly different angle; rim of the jar visible, wax pool glowing at top with sharp boundary between melted (orange) and solid (white) wax.
Closer view of the lit jar; flame at center of the orange melt pool, white wax level below.
Continued burn shot; cinder blocks framing the jar in the brick alcove.
Steady close on the burning mason jar candle showing pronounced two-tone wax with melted top and unmelted base.
Similar framing; flame remains lit, melt pool depth roughly a third of the jar.
Lit jar with subtle camera reframe; melt pool visible, wick centered in glowing orange wax.
Closer composition with cinder blocks in foreground, jar candle still burning with the partial melt pool.
Final framing of the lit mason jar in the brick fireplace, two-tone wax and centered flame still visible.

windows.summary_v2: A poured mason-jar candle slowly cures on a terracotta saucer between two concrete blocks inside a warm fireplace, its amber molten top wax setting over a solidified white base.

tags_v2.action: curing poured candle using fireplace warmth

seconds_v2.desc: A mason jar candle sits on a terracotta saucer flanked by two concrete blocks inside a sooty fireplace; its top wax layer glows amber/molten over a set opaque-white lower half.
Closer front view of the jar; the warm orange semi-molten top wax pool sits above the solidified white wax, glowing around the wick area.
Camera tilts up and over the jar mouth, looking down into the glowing amber wax surface still soft and warm inside the glass.
Top-down into the jar: the wax surface is a translucent glowing orange with a few dark debris flecks, not yet fully set.
Angled overhead view of the glowing jar resting on the terracotta dish, the warm wax pool bright against the dim hearth.
Camera lowers back to a frontal view; the jar's upper wax glows amber over the white set base, blocks on either side.
Front view of the curing mason-jar candle on its saucer between the two concrete blocks, top wax still warm and translucent.
Same steady front shot; the amber molten top half sits over the opaque white solidified lower wax as it slowly cures.
Final frame: the mason jar candle continues setting in the fireplace, glowing warm-orange wax above cooled white wax.

Candle still burning steadily inside the mason jar; melt pool at the top showing soft translucent wax beneath the flame.

Camera pulled back further; the jar candle, saucer, rocks and metal fire grate bars are all in frame inside the ash-dusted firebox.
Glowing jar candle on terracotta dish flanked by stones, sitting on a black metal grate over a layer of ash in the fireplace.
Lit candle in the glass jar continues to burn on the saucer between the two rocks, full fireplace interior with grate visible.
Final wide view: white jar candle burning on the terracotta saucer with rocks, set on the fireplace grate amid ash and soot-stained brick.
